No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a required graduate-level course, providing quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and developing quantitative reasoning skills for employment (Target 4.4).
evidence: apply these techniques to real-world decision-making

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course's focus on numerical optimization, simulation, and supply chain management directly enhances economic productivity and innovation (Target 8.2) for business decision problems.
evidence: solve a variety of business decision problems

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course directly supports upgrading industrial capabilities and innovation (Target 9.5) through 'manufacturing systems,' 'supply chain management,' and 'innovate operations management' with IT.
evidence: Ability to integrate information technology and innovate operations management

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course's application to 'inventory control models' and 'manufacturing systems' directly addresses efficient resource use (Target 12.2) and waste reduction (Target 12.5).

Climate Action.reason: Decision-making under uncertainty and stochastic simulation modeling can be inferred as tools for assessing climate-related risks and adaptive capacity (Target 13.1).

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to peace, justice, or institutions.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The 'Teamwork ability' core competence provides a minimal, inferred link to fostering partnerships (Target 17.17).
